nasb.text: On the south side, 4,500 cubits by measurement, shall be three gates: the gate of Simeon, one; the gate of Issachar, one; the gate of Zebulun, one.

esv.text: On the south side, which is to be 4,500 cubits by measure, three gates, the gate of Simeon, the gate of Issachar, and the gate of Zebulun.

cnv.text: 南面的長度是二千二百五十公尺，有三個門口，一個是西緬門，一個是以薩迦門，一個是西布倫門。

ccb.text: 南面的墙是二点五公里长，有三道门，分别是西缅门、以萨迦门和西布伦门。
